ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "car_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the car */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the car */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the car */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V6, V8, Inline-4) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Manual, Automatic) */,
  "drive_system" TEXT /* Drive system (e.g., Front-wheel drive, Rear-wheel drive, All-wheel drive) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel, Electric) */,
  "num_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors (e.g., 2, 4) */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Coupe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin (e.g., USA, Europe) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the origin (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the origin country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (fuel efficiency) */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the car in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "top_speed" INTEGER /* Top speed of the car in mph */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine in lb-ft */,
  "emissions" TEXT /* Emissions level (e.g., Euro 6, LEV) */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in gallons */,
  "cargo_capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity in cubic feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Research, Data Science, IT) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the data version (e.g., draft, published, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
